description: Lock standard_legal_forms to written legal-document formats and clauses, not civic registry infrastructure.

checks.reason: Civic contract registries are not a general prerequisite for written legal-document forms.
The scoped legal-form technology is a written-document and clause-pattern practice.
Contract-law practice supplies the transaction and petition categories organized by the forms.
The scoped claim is anchored to Hellenistic/Ptolemaic documentary legal forms rather than a generic Classical placeholder.
